revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- EDIT TEMPLATE DOCUMENTATION BELOW THIS LINE --->
==Usage== Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} to tag a statement that lacks a source confirming or providing its chronology or time-line as per [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|Citing sources]].
==Examples== *In the sentence {{xt|The organization was founded in 1978 after natural disasters had increased.}} :*Use {{Tl|Citation needed}} if you are requesting a source stating that the organization was founded in 1978 :*Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} if you are requesting is a source stating that disasters increased prior to the time of foundation
*In the sentence ''"those Celtic tribes survived more than one invasion..."'': :*Use {{Tl|Citation needed}} if you are requesting a source stating that the tribes survived multiple invasions :*Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} if what you are requesting a source stating when invasions occurred
==Redirects== *{{tl|Time fact}}
==See also== *[[Wikipedia:Citing sources]]
{{inline tags}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates]] [[Category:Inline citation cleanup templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- EDIT TEMPLATE DOCUMENTATION BELOW THIS LINE --->
==Usage== Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} to tag a statement that lacks a source confirming or providing its chronology or time-line as per [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|Citing sources]].
==Examples== *In the sentence {{xt|The organization was founded in 1978 after natural disasters had increased.}} :*Use {{Tl|Citation needed}} if you are requesting a source stating that the organization was founded in 1978 :*Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} if you are requesting is a source stating that disasters increased prior to the time of foundation
*In the sentence ''"those Celtic tribes survived more than one invasion..."'': :*Use {{Tl|Citation needed}} if you are requesting a source stating that the tribes survived multiple invasions :*Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} if what you are requesting a source stating when invasions occurred
==Redirects== *{{tl|Time fact}}
==See also== *[[Wikipedia:Citing sources]]
{{inline tags}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates]] [[Category:Inline citation cleanup templates]] }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] </noinclude>

==Usage== Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} to tag a statement that lacks a source confirming or providing its chronology or time-line as per [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|Citing sources]].
==Examples== *In the sentence {{xt|The organization was founded in 1978 after natural disasters had increased.}} :*Use {{Tl|Citation needed}} if you are requesting a source stating that the organization was founded in 1978 :*Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} if you are requesting is a source stating that disasters increased prior to the time of foundation
*In the sentence ''"those Celtic tribes survived more than one invasion..."'': :*Use {{Tl|Citation needed}} if you are requesting a source stating that the tribes survived multiple invasions :*Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} if what you are requesting a source stating when invasions occurred

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- EDIT TEMPLATE DOCUMENTATION BELOW THIS LINE --->
==Usage== Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} to tag a statement that lacks a source confirming or providing its chronology or time-line as per [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|Citing sources]].
==Examples== *In the sentence {{xt|The organization was founded in 1978 after natural disasters had increased.}} :*Use {{Tl|Citation needed}} if you are requesting a source stating that the organization was founded in 1978 :*Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} if you are requesting is a source stating that disasters increased prior to the time of foundation
*In the sentence ''"those Celtic tribes survived more than one invasion..."'': :*Use {{Tl|Citation needed}} if you are requesting a source stating that the tribes survived multiple invasions :*Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} if what you are requesting a source stating when invasions occurred

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- EDIT TEMPLATE DOCUMENTATION BELOW THIS LINE --->
==Usage== Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} to tag a statement that lacks a source confirming or providing its chronology or time-line as per [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|Citing sources]].
==Examples== *In the sentence {{xt|The organization was founded in 1978 after natural disasters had increased.}} :*Use {{Tl|Citation needed}} if you are requesting a source stating that the organization was founded in 1978 :*Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} if you are requesting is a source stating that disasters increased prior to the time of foundation
*In the sentence ''"those Celtic tribes survived more than one invasion..."'': :*Use {{Tl|Citation needed}} if you are requesting a source stating that the tribes survived multiple invasions :*Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} if what you are requesting a source stating when invasions occurred
==Redirects== *{{tl|Time fact}}
==See also== *[[Wikipedia:Citing sources]]
{{inline tags}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates]] [[Category:Inline citation cleanup templates]] }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- EDIT TEMPLATE DOCUMENTATION BELOW THIS LINE --->
==Usage== Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} to tag a statement that lacks a source confirming or providing its chronology or time-line as per [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|Citing sources]].
==Examples== *In the sentence {{xt|The organization was founded in 1978 after natural disasters had increased.}} :*Use {{Tl|Citation needed}} if you are requesting a source stating that the organization was founded in 1978 :*Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} if you are requesting is a source stating that disasters increased prior to the time of foundation
*In the sentence ''"those Celtic tribes survived more than one invasion..."'': :*Use {{Tl|Citation needed}} if you are requesting a source stating that the tribes survived multiple invasions :*Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} if what you are requesting a source stating when invasions occurred
==Redirects== *{{tl|Time fact}}
==See also== *[[Wikipedia:Citing sources]]
{{inline tags}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates]] [[Category:Inline citation cleanup templates]] }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- EDIT TEMPLATE DOCUMENTATION BELOW THIS LINE --->
==Usage== Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} to tag a statement that lacks a source confirming or providing its chronology or time-line as per [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|Citing sources]].
==Examples== *In the sentence {{xt|The organization was founded in 1978 after natural disasters had increased.}} :*Use {{Tl|Citation needed}} if you are requesting a source stating that the organization was founded in 1978 :*Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} if you are requesting is a source stating that disasters increased prior to the time of foundation
*In the sentence ''"those Celtic tribes survived more than one invasion..."'': :*Use {{Tl|Citation needed}} if you are requesting a source stating that the tribes survived multiple invasions :*Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} if what you are requesting a source stating when invasions occurred
==Redirects== *{{tl|Time fact}}

{{inline tags}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates]] [[Category:Inline citation cleanup templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23168229401|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- EDIT TEMPLATE DOCUMENTATION BELOW THIS LINE --->
==Usage== Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} to tag a statement that lacks a source confirming or providing its chronology or time-line as per [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|Citing sources]].
==Examples== *In the sentence {{xt|The organization was founded in 1978 after natural disasters had increased.}} :*Use {{Tl|Citation needed}} if you are requesting a source stating that the organization was founded in 1978 :*Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} if you are requesting is a source stating that disasters increased prior to the time of foundation
*In the sentence ''"those Celtic tribes survived more than one invasion..."'': :*Use {{Tl|Citation needed}} if you are requesting a source stating that the tribes survived multiple invasions :*Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} if what you are requesting a source stating when invasions occurred
==Redirects== *{{tl|Time fact}}
==See also== *[[Wikipedia:Citing sources]]
{{inline tags}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- EDIT TEMPLATE DOCUMENTATION BELOW THIS LINE --->
==Usage== Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} to tag a statement that lacks a source confirming or providing its chronology or time-line as per [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|Citing sources]].
==Examples== *In the sentence {{xt|The organization was founded in 1978 after natural disasters had increased.}} :*Use {{Tl|Citation needed}} if you are requesting a source stating that the organization was founded in 1978 :*Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} if you are requesting is a source stating that disasters increased prior to the time of foundation
*In the sentence ''"those Celtic tribes survived more than one invasion..."'': :*Use {{Tl|Citation needed}} if you are requesting a source stating that the tribes survived multiple invasions :*Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} if what you are requesting a source stating when invasions occurred

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Chronology_citation_needed%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Chronology_citation_needed%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}} <!-- EDIT TEMPLATE DOCUMENTATION BELOW THIS LINE --->
==Usage== Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} to tag a statement that lacks a source confirming or providing its chronology or time-line as per [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|Citing sources]].
==Examples== *In the sentence {{xt|The organization was founded in 1978 after natural disasters had increased.}} :*Use {{Tl|Citation needed}} if you are requesting a source stating that the organization was founded in 1978 :*Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} if you are requesting is a source stating that disasters increased prior to the time of foundation
*In the sentence ''"those Celtic tribes survived more than one invasion..."'': :*Use {{Tl|Citation needed}} if you are requesting a source stating that the tribes survived multiple invasions :*Use {{Tl|Chronology citation needed}} if what you are requesting a source stating when invasions occurred
==Redirects== *{{tl|Time fact}}
==See also== *[[Wikipedia:Citing sources]]
{{inline tags}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates]] [[Category:Inline citation cleanup templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
